title: My life and wealth are the same shape
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for claiming that wealth belongs inside the life you already have.
excerpt: A short affirmation practice from Day 26 of the MONEY program. Use to state the compatibility of wealth and the life you are building, without condition.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 26 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when wealth and your current life feel like they belong to different worlds — as if accepting one requires giving up the other.

content.text: An affirmation from Day 26 of the MONEY program. The phrase "same shape" is specific: wealth doesn't require you to become someone else or live differently. It fits the outline of the life you are already building.
My life and wealth are the same shape.

Say it out loud three times, hand on heart. If the statement produces resistance (a sense that your life as it stands isn't quite wealthy enough, or that wealth would require changes you aren't ready for), that's the part to stay with.
Adapted from Day 26 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
